categories.description: Hospitals and urgent care locations for advanced treatment when local clinics are closed or overwhelmed.
Fuel outlets that may support evacuation, generator use, or essential travel when supply is constrained.
Food and household supply points that may support replenishment before or after an event.
Pharmacies for prescriptions, first aid restock, and basic medical supplies.
Hardware outlets for repairs, sandbags, tools, tarps, batteries, and emergency building supplies.
Police stations and service counters that may assist with safety information and incident reporting.
Water collection or potable water support points that may be relevant when mains supply is disrupted.
Shelter and refuge locations that may support temporary relocation during an active emergency.
